items.claim: Mike Davis has been riddled with injuries throughout his career.
items.quote: Davis has been riddled with injuries

items.claim: Nurullo Aliev will push the pace and secure an opportunistic takedown in the matchup.
items.quote: Narula Ali is going to be the one to to push that pace and and get that opportunistic takedown

items.claim: Abdul Hussein is 15-2 in professional MMA.
items.quote: He's 15-2 taking on Cody Gibson, who's 21 and 12.

items.claim: Cody Gibson has a history of fading significantly after a high-output first round.
items.quote: if he couldn't get you out of there, he'd fall off a major cliff even in his prime.

items.claim: Steve Erceg is on a two-fight win streak.
items.quote: Now he's on a two-ight win streak.

items.claim: Ramazan Temirov possesses explosive athleticism and one-punch knockout power.
items.quote: Rammmanov's got that one hit or quitter knockout power, that insane explosive athleticism

items.claim: Abubakar Vagaev enters the UFC with 28 professional fights under his belt.
items.quote: this guy come into the UFC with 28 pro fights under his belt
